my-workspace/server/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Java 17+ ecosystems.
my-workspace/server/pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in newer Jakarta EE versions; code relying on it may fail at runtime or compile if the artifact is missing.

my-workspace/server/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ compilation.
my-workspace/server/pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 17+ can lead to mismatched class file versions or warnings; release is the standard way to set language level and bootstrap classpath.
